title: trifolium medium f. pedunculosum
intro: Trifolium medium f. pedunculosum, also known as the red clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and estrogenic effects, making it a popular remedy for menopausal symptoms and bone health. The health benefits of red clover include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and alleviating menopausal symptoms such as hot flashes and mood swings. Red clover is typically prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
